rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Evelyn Homs Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Plaintiff Pure Entertainment Llcs Second Amended Complaint.Pdf
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 29, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT EVELYN HOM'S Demurrer To Plaintiff Pure Entertainment Llcs Second Amended Complaint. Sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff's current complaint is uncertain and confusing. Plaintiff shall amend the complaint and clearly allege (1) in what capacity Katie Hom entered into the Lease/Settlement agreement - as an individual owner/agent for owner/as trustee of Trust owner; (2) in what capacity the currently named Defendants are being sued - as original owners on whose behalf Katie Hom entered into the agreements; as successor owners/landlords to Katie Hom; as agents for the owner of the Property; as successors to decedent Katie Hom as individual owner/agent for owner. If Plaintiff pleads in the alternative, Plaintiff shall clearly allege each capacity of Katie Hom, as capacity of the successors, and basis for liability. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Evelyn Hom Notice Of Special Motion To Strike Plaintiff Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 29, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT EVELYN HOM'S Special Motion To Strike Plaintiff Second Amended Complaint. DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden and show that Second Amended Complaint or any cause of action therein arises out of protected activity. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. VS. ROGER BURGOS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; Proposed Response; And Proposed Order

rulings.Case Title: HC 650 SACRAMENTO, LLC VS. LAW OFFICES OF WEISBERG & MILLER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 29, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANT WEISBERG & MILLER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED with 5-day leave to amend for Plaintiff to address in good faith issues raised by demurrer. Plaintiff shall specify the exact terms of the agreements breached and where these terms may be found in the agreements. Plaintiff also shall allege facts giving rise to it's allegation that Defendant was in violation by not removing the garbage bins and to allege how Defendant was to determine which stairwell was at issue in the Notice to Cure or Quit. The issues that Plaintiff labeled "inconsequential" in it's opposition shall also be addressed. =(501/REQ)
